backgrounds.label: Light Blue Diagonal Gradient
backgrounds.value: linear-gradient(to bottom right, hsl(var(--primary) / 0.05), transparent, hsl(var(--chart-2) / 0.05))

preview_examples.importYaml:
- type: syllabus
  section_id: syllabus-925r5b
  variant: program-modules
  program_title: Cybersecurity Program Overview
  program_description: Master the complete cybersecurity stack from network security to penetration testing. Build real-world defensive and offensive skills using the industry-standard tools employers are looking for.
  tech_logos:
    - name: Linux
      icon: linux
    - name: Python
      icon: python
    - name: Networks
      icon: server
    - name: Security
      icon: shield
    - name: Terminal
      icon: terminal
    - name: Git
      icon: git
  module_cards:
    - title: Fundamentals and Network Security
      duration: Weeks 1-3
      objectives:
        - Understand computer security fundamentals and threat landscapes
        - Learn network security essentials and packet analysis
        - Use Packet Tracer for visual simulation and network tracing
      projects: Build secure network architectures from scratch
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconNetwork
    - title: Linux and Server Administration
      duration: Weeks 4-6
      objectives:
        - Master Linux command line and shell scripting
        - Configure, secure, and manage Linux-based systems
        - Implement server hardening and access controls
      projects: Deploy and secure production-ready Linux servers
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconTerminal2
    - title: Cyber Intelligence
      duration: Weeks 7-9
      objectives:
        - Develop threat intelligence gathering and analysis skills
        - Learn OSINT techniques for reconnaissance
        - Identify, track, and predict cyber threats
      projects: Create comprehensive threat intelligence reports
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconSearch
    - title: Penetration Testing
      duration: Weeks 10-12
      objectives:
        - Practice ethical hacking aligned with EJPT certification
        - Uncover vulnerabilities and simulate attack scenarios
        - Document findings using Metasploit and Nmap
      projects: Conduct full penetration tests on simulated environments
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconShieldLock
    - title: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
      duration: Weeks 13-14
      objectives:
        - Safeguard sensitive information and prevent breaches
        - Implement DLP strategies and policies
        - Protect organizational assets from internal/external threats
      projects: Design enterprise DLP implementation plans
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconDatabase
    - title: NIST Framework
      duration: Weeks 15-16
      objectives:
        - Master the NIST Cybersecurity Framework
        - Apply compliance and risk management practices
        - Prepare for incident response and recovery
      projects: Create organizational security assessment reports
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconClipboardCheck
  paddingY:
    desktop: md

- type: syllabus
  section_id: syllabus-skzl68
  variant: program-modules
  program_title: Data Science and Machine Learning Program Overview
  program_description: Master the industry-standard toolkit used by modern data teams. Go beyond simple analysis to build production-ready systems—from engineering raw data to deploying the predictive models that companies use to drive innovation and scale.
  tech_logos:
    - name: Python
      icon: python
    - name: TensorFlow
      icon: tensorflow
    - name: Pandas
      icon: pandas
    - name: NumPy
      icon: numpy
    - name: SQL
      icon: sql
    - name: Git
      icon: git
  module_cards:
    - title: Python Basics & Notebooks
      duration: Weeks 1-3
      objectives:
        - Master Python fundamentals including conditionals, functions, and data structures
        - Work with Jupyter notebooks for interactive data exploration
        - Build a strong programming foundation for machine learning
      projects: Complete Python exercises and create your first data analysis notebook
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconBrandPython
    - title: Data Analysis & Visualization
      duration: Weeks 4-6
      objectives:
        - Analyze and manipulate data with Pandas
        - Clean, normalize, and transform datasets
        - Create impactful visualizations with Matplotlib and Seaborn
      projects: Build interactive data dashboards and exploratory analysis reports
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconChartBar
    - title: Data Collection with SQL, Scraping & APIs
      duration: Weeks 7-8
      objectives:
        - Write SQL queries to extract data from databases
        - Scrape websites with BeautifulSoup
        - Work with REST APIs to gather real-world data
      projects: Build a data pipeline that collects and processes data from multiple sources
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconDatabase
    - title: Math & Probability Foundations
      duration: Weeks 9-10
      objectives:
        - Master probability and statistics concepts
        - Understand linear algebra fundamentals
        - Learn matrix operations that power ML algorithms
      projects: Apply statistical analysis to real-world datasets
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconMath
    - title: Applied Machine Learning
      duration: Weeks 11-14
      objectives:
        - Build regression and classification models
        - Implement decision trees, random forests, and boosting
        - Master clustering and time series forecasting
      projects: Train, evaluate, and optimize ML models for real-world problems
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconBrain
    - title: Deep Learning, NLP & Model Deployment
      duration: Weeks 15-16
      objectives:
        - Build neural networks with TensorFlow and Keras
        - Implement natural language processing techniques
        - Deploy models to production environments
      projects: Create and deploy a complete ML web application
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconRocket
  marginY:
    desktop: md none
  paddingY:
    desktop: md lg
